examples.title: Algorithm: Process Scheduling
examples.description: Demonstrates a basic process scheduling algorithm
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ScheduleProcesses
INPUT: processes (list of processes)
OUTPUT: scheduledProcesses (list of scheduled processes)

BEGIN
 FOR EACH process IN processes
 IF process.arrivalTime <= currentTime
 Add process to readyQueue
 END FOR
 WHILE readyQueue IS NOT EMPTY
 process = Dequeue(readyQueue)
 Assign CPU to process
 currentTime += process.burstTime
 Add process to scheduledProcesses
 END WHILE
 RETURN scheduledProcesses
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates a basic process scheduling algorithm. It iterates over a list of processes, adds them to a ready queue if their arrival time is less than or equal to the current time, and then assigns the CPU to each process in the ready queue.

examples.title: Python: Process Scheduling
examples.description: Implements a basic process scheduling algorithm in Python
examples.explanation: This Python code implements a basic process scheduling algorithm. It defines a `Process` class to represent processes with arrival and burst times, and a `schedule_processes` function to schedule these processes.

examples.title: C: Process Scheduling
examples.description: Implements a basic process scheduling algorithm in C
examples.explanation: This C code implements a basic process scheduling algorithm. It defines a `Process` struct to represent processes with arrival and burst times, and a `schedule_processes` function to schedule these processes.
